titleStmt.title: SII 5, appendix, no. 46: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 46. (A.R. No. 46 of 1888). IN THE SAME PLACE. See No. 117 of South Indian Inscriptions, Vol. I.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sakalalokaccakra vartti Irācanārāyaṇaṉ Āntināṭu palakoyil tāṉattārkku karaivaḻi
kaṟpaṟṟu pūcaipātikku koḷlum vari Āṟāvatuvaraiyum koṇṭupontapaṭiyāle pūcaiyum
camārātaṉaiyum tiruppaṇiyum naṭavātapaṭiyāle Āṟāvatukku Etirām(ā)āṇṭu mutalukku Aḷave
ṟṟam Uṭpaṭa pūcaipāti Uḷḷa nilattukku koḷḷum vari kaḻittu Immutal pūcai camārātaṉai tiruppaṇi
kku kuṭuttaaḷavukku pūcaippātiyāl Uḷḷa nilam Aḷaveṟṟam Uṭpaṭa pakuntukoṇṭu sarvva mānya Iṟaiili
yākac cantirātittavaraiyum cellak kallu veṭṭikkoṇṭu tāḻvaṟa naṭattippokavum Eṉa coṉṉamai Ippaṭi
ceyka Aruḷicceytu Aruḷiṉapaṭikku ciṟumuṟi Āntināṭu nāṭṭārkku taṅkaḷ
paṟṟil karaivaḻi kaṟpaṟṟup palataḷi pūcaippātikku koḷḷum vari Āṟuvatuva
raiyuṅ koṇṭa Ittāle pūcaiyum camārātaṉaiyum tiruppaṇiyum naṭavātapa
ṭiyāle Āṟāvatukku Etirāmaṇṭai mutalukku Aḷaveṟṟa muṭpaṭa pūcaippā
ti Uḷḷa nilattukku koḷḷum vari kaḻittu Immutal pūcai camārātaṉai tirup
paṇikku kuṭuttaḷavukku tānattāṟ keṟa pūcaippātiyāluḷḷa mulamum Aḷave
ṟṟa muṭpaṭap pakuntu kuṭuttu sarvva mānya Iṟaiyiliyākac cantirātittavaraiyum
cellak kalluveṭṭikkuṭuttu tāḻvaṟa naṭattippokavum pāṟka Eṉṟu Aruḷicceytatu .
Digital edition of SII 5, appendix, no. 46 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
